news.headline: UNC QB Max Johnson featured on Season 3 of ZIPS "Car Wash Convos", sharing his "never give up" spirit in episode.
news.summary: Before suffering a major injury in 2024, Max secured a spot on the Season 3 lineup of "Car Wash Convos" by ZIPS. In his episode, he candidly discussed his unwavering "never give up" attitude. The show broadcasted from Chapel Hill, North Carolina on Dec. 5, 2024, marking the commencement of the inaugural episode at the University of North Carolina.

news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for investors of Xiao-I Corp with losses exceeding $50,000. Contact for discussion.
news.summary: Securities Litigation Partner James Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have faced losses surpassing $50,000 in Xiao-I to reach out to him directly. If you have suffered losses greater than $50,000 by investing in Xiao-I American, Wilson is available to discuss your potential courses of action.

news.headline: Dr. Ryan Saadi praises public servants; Mayor Victor Sordillo inducted into NJ League of Municipalities Hall of Fame.
news.summary: Warren, New Jersey - On December 5th, 2024, Dr. Ryan Saadi, the CEO of Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: TVGN), a clinical-stage specialty immunotherapy biotech company, announced the induction of their Board Member, Victor Sordillo PE, CSP, MBA, into The New Jersey League of Municipalities Hall of Fame. Tevogen Bio focuses on developing off-the-shelf, genetically unmodified T cell therapeutics for treating infectious diseases and cancers.

news.headline: Bitcoin's price surges above $100,000 post-election, sparking predictions of hitting $150,000-250,000 soon.
news.summary: After the price of Bitcoin soared over $100,000 shortly following Trump’s reelection, experts are now making bullish forecasts for the cryptocurrency, with some predicting it could reach anywhere from $150,000 to $250,000 in the near future.

news.headline: Corvias Property Management organizes fall events across seven Army installations to support military families.
news.summary: In Warwick, R.I., Corvias Property Management is dedicated to creating strong, vibrant communities for service members and their families across its seven Army installations. Through a series of fall events, they showcase their commitment to improving residents' quality of life and fostering connections among neighbors. Corvias acknowledges the challenges military families encounter and focuses on building spaces where they can thrive. These annual events underscore Corvias' efforts to enhance community support and create a welcoming environment for approximately [Specify Number] residents.

news.headline: Littelfuse Investor Day on Feb 26 in NYC to present business strategy and growth objectives. CEO and CFO to lead.
news.summary: Littelfuse, Inc. (NASDAQ: LFUS) recently disclosed plans for an Investor Day set to take place on February 26, 2025, in New York City. The event will feature key company figures including CEO Dave Heinzmann and CFO Meenal Sethna, along with other senior leaders, who will delve into the organization's business strategy, growth catalysts, and financial goals. This initiative is part of the company's commitment to driving a sustainable, connected, and safer world.

news.headline: Skullcandy and THX partner to bring THX Spatial Audio to 2025 headphones for immersive experience.
news.summary: In San Francisco, THX Ltd., a renowned company specializing in high-fidelity audio and video tuning, certification, and technology, has partnered with Skullcandy®, a well-known lifestyle audio brand. Together, they have announced a strategic collaboration to incorporate THX® Spatial Audio into select Skullcandy headphones by 2025. This partnership aims to enhance users' listening experiences by providing a more profound and immersive sound quality across various activities such as music, movies, games, streaming, sports, and more. This integration will offer a superior audio experience to consumers, elevating the quality and enjoyment of their audio content.

news.headline: AI spending in enterprises to rise by 5.7% in 2025, despite overall IT budget increase of under 2%: ISG Study.
news.summary: A recent study conducted in Stamford, Connecticut shows that enterprises are intending to boost their investment in artificial intelligence (AI) by approximately 5.7% in 2025. This rise in AI spending comes alongside more moderate growth in their overall IT budgets.

news.headline: Majority of Canadians (74%) cutting back on holiday spending amid increasing living costs, per Spring Financial Survey.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was stated that a record number of people attended the annual music festival, with over 100,000 attendees this year. The event featured over 200 musical acts across multiple stages, drawing attendees from all over the country. Additionally, the festival generated over $5 million in revenue for the local economy, showcasing its growing importance as a cultural and economic driver in the region. Overall, this year's event was deemed a huge success, with organizers already planning next year's festival to be even bigger and better.

news.headline: Nsight Health partners with Physicians Choice Medical in Miami to offer advanced patient monitoring solutions.
news.summary: In Miami on December 5th, 2024, Nsight Health, a prominent company specializing in Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM) and Chronic Care Management (CCM), revealed a significant collaboration with Physicians Choice® Medical. The partnership aims to enhance services related to Billing, Revenue Cycle Management, Credentialing, and Practice.

news.headline: Spirit Airlines had a successful Thanksgiving week with over 5,200 flights connecting Guests to loved ones.
news.summary: In Dania Beach, Florida on December 5, 2024, Spirit Airlines showcased an impressive start to the bustling holiday travel period by facilitating connections for Guests across 5,200 flights throughout Thanksgiving week. The airline notably bolstered its performance during this period, enhancing travel experiences for numerous individuals looking to reunite with loved ones.

news.headline: Nordic and Benevolence Health collaborate to aid healthcare organizations with CMS TEAM bundled payment model.
news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin on December 5, 2024, Nordic®, a worldwide health and technology consulting firm, unveiled a collaboration with Benevolence Health, a key developer of value-based care strategies. This partnership aims to aid hospitals mandated to engage in the new Centers for Medicare &...

news.headline: Clarios signs connected services deal after successful pilot, reducing idling by 40% for €1,300 annual fuel savings.
news.summary: A recent development in the commercial vehicle industry involves the introduction of a new product aimed at reducing idling in these vehicles. Clarios Connected Services has finalized an agreement following a successful trial with a European heavy-duty fleet operator. The innovative idle reduction solution has demonstrated a significant 40% decrease in unnecessary idling, ultimately improving fleet efficiency. It is estimated that this solution could result in projected annual fuel savings of €1,300 per vehicle.

news.headline: Startup Across AI raises seed round funding co-led by Village Global and Cota Capital, to launch Agentic AI for enterprise workflows.
news.summary: In San Francisco on December 5, 2024, the startup Across AI revealed it has secured funding in a seed round that was oversubscribed. The investment was co-led by Village Global and Cota Capital. This funding will support the development and launch of their Agentic AI technology tailored for enterprise workflows. The exact amount of funding raised was not disclosed.

news.headline: Huge acquired by AEA Investors, joins forces with Hero Digital to create leading digital transformation business.
news.summary: Today in Brooklyn, two forward-thinking brands have united to form a prominent independent digital transformation entity. AEA Investors ("AEA") has acquired Huge, a renowned experience design and technology company. The acquisition marks a significant move in the industry, consolidating the strengths of both companies. This collaboration is set to elevate their position and offerings in the market.

news.headline: Alaska Airlines named official airline of Coachella & Stagecoach Festivals, offering most flights to Palm Springs.
news.summary: Prepare for an exceptional festival experience and an unforgettable trip to the desert skies next spring, as Alaska Airlines offers the most flights to Palm Springs. Commencing in April, this journey from Seattle promises to deliver music, style, and lasting memories.

news.headline: Kristina M. Johnson and Dave Shull appointed to Society for Science's Board of Trustees, bringing fresh perspectives.
news.summary: Washington, 5th December 2024 - Kristina M. Johnson and Dave Shull have recently become members of the Board of Trustees at the Society for Science. This announcement marks an important development for the organization, as their inclusion brings a wealth of experience and knowledge. The Society for Science expressed their enthusiasm regarding this addition, highlighting the value of their diverse expertise and fresh perspectives. This move is expected to further enhance the board's capabilities and overall impact.

news.headline: Potential confirmation of Trump's defense pick may depend on Iowa Senator Ernst's support.
Global fire-resistant glass market to grow significantly by 2033 due to increased demand for safety in construction.
news.summary: The global fire-resistant glass market is poised for significant growth, with a forecasted analysis spanning from 2024 to 2033. This market report, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, emphasizes the importance of fire-resistant glass in contemporary construction. The increasing emphasis on safety and adherence to fire regulations is a key driver for this market, with fire-resistant glass playing a critical role in safeguarding buildings and their occupants. The report covers various applications, types, and regions relevant to this market segment, providing valuable insights for stakeholders.

news.headline: Susan Wallace promoted to Vice President & Chief HR Officer at Carlisle Companies (NYSE: CSL), with 30 years of experience.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, Carlisle Companies Incorporated (NYSE:CSL) has appointed Susan Wallace as the Vice President & Chief Human Resources Officer. She initially joined Carlisle Construction Materials in April 2019 as the Human Resources Director and later became the Vice President of Human Resources for the entire company in February 2024. Prior to her role at Carlisle, Ms. Wallace had a tenure at TE Connectivity and holds an impressive 30 years of experience in the field of human resources.

Huge is set to merge with Hero Digital, a current AEA portfolio company. The financial details of the transaction remain undisclosed.

(NYSE: FE), in Holmdel, New Jersey marks the beginning of a significant project totaling $95 million. The enhancements aim to improve electric reliability and are part of a larger initiative by the company.

news.headline: Canada's ventureLAB and Serbia's Science and Technology Parks join forces to advance global innovation in hardware and software.
news.summary: In Markham, Ontario, ventureLAB, a prominent hub for hardware technology and enterprise software innovation in Canada, has recently finalized a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Serbia’s Science and Technology Parks including Belgrade, Niš, Čačak, and Novi Sad. This partnership was solidified post the Global Partnership on Artificial Intelligence (GPAI) Summit 2024. The agreement signifies a significant step in enhancing collaboration between the two countries to drive progress in hardware technology and enterprise innovation.

news.headline: Industrial robots market to reach $37.1 billion by 2031 per Meticulous Research, a steep increase from current levels.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in Redding, California, a recent market study was released concerning the Industrial Robots Market. This report delves into the size, share, forecast, and trends within the industry. It focuses on various components such as Robots, Robot Accessories, different Payload capacities ranging from Up to 60 Kg to 60 to 100 KG, various Applications with a spotlight on Material Handling, and End-use sectors. The in-depth analysis provides invaluable insights for stakeholders, with crucial figures and data on market growth and trajectory.

news.headline: ProVen Growth and Income VCT plc announces issuance of new equity shares.
Israel is poised for a record year of tech mergers and acquisitions in 2024, particularly in cyber and AI sectors.
SentinelOne beats Q3 sales estimates with $210.65 million revenue. Expects $222 million in Q4 and $818 million in 2025. CEO is optimistic.
news.summary: SentinelOne Inc, listed on the NYSE as S, announced its third-quarter sales results, surpassing expectations. The company reported revenue of $210.65 million for the quarter, exceeding the estimated $209.72 million. For the fourth quarter, SentinelOne anticipates revenue of $222 million compared to estimates of $220.77 million. Looking ahead to the full year 2025, the company projects revenue of $818 million against estimates of $815.92 million. CEO Tomer Weingarten expressed confidence in the company's Singularity Platform, stating that enterprises are increasingly opting for their real-time, autonomous security solutions. Despite the positive performance, SentinelOne saw a 10.2% drop in shares. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Korn Ferry beats revenue estimates but sees a 4.3% dip YoY at $674.37M. Adjusted EBITDA increased to $117.0M.
news.summary: Korn Ferry's (NYSE:KFY) stock price declined following the release of their second-quarter FY25 results. The company reported a 4.3% year-over-year drop in revenue to $681.96 million, surpassing the consensus estimate of $675.35 million. Fee revenue for the global organizational consulting firm also saw a decrease of 4.2% year over year to $674.37 million. Adjusted EBITDA increased to $117.0 million from $98.5 million, resulting in an adjusted margin of 17.4%, representing a 340bps year-over-year increase. The adjusted EPS of $1.21 was in line with expectations. Korn Ferry concluded the quarter with cash and equivalents amounting to $694.85 million.

news.headline: Dental supplier Patterson Companies considers sale or merger after mixed Q2 earnings. Q2 2025 net sales: $1.67 billion, up 1.3% YOY. CEO attributes performance to challenging market.
news.summary: Patterson Companies Inc (NASDAQ:PDCO) recently revealed plans to explore strategic options such as a sale or merger in order to enhance shareholder value. This decision was announced alongside the company’s second-quarter financial report. Despite facing difficulties in the current market environment, CEO Don Zurbay described earnings as mixed. The company reported a second-quarter net sales figure of $1.67 billion for 2025, showing a 1.3% increase compared to the previous year. This news was shared in a recent press release; further details can be found on financial news platforms.

news.headline: Five Below (NASDAQ:FIVE) exceeded Q3 earnings with 42 cents per share vs estimated 17 cents, revenue reached $843.71 million beating the expected $798.58 million. Guidance for fiscal 2024 looks strong.
news.summary: Five Below, Inc. (NASDAQ:FIVE) surpassed expectations in its third quarter results, revealing earnings of 42 cents per share, outperforming the analyst consensus of 17 cents. The company's quarterly revenue stood at $843.71 million, surpassing the analyst consensus of $798.58 million and marking growth from the previous year's sales of $736.4 million. The company provided a robust guidance for fiscal 2024. Ken Bull, the Interim CEO and COO of Five Below, expressed satisfaction with the quarter's results, noting improved operational execution and strong performance across various merchandise categories compared to the prior quarter.

news.headline: Eve Lee to become new CEO of Society of Interventional Radiology starting Jan. 27, 2025, announced on Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: On January 27, 2025, Eve Lee, who holds an MBA and CAE, will be joining the Society of Interventional Radiology (SIR) as the new chief executive officer. The announcement was made on December 5, 2024, in Fairfax, Virginia. Ms. Lee's role will involve advancing the mission of SIR and overseeing its operations.

news.headline: Brown-Forman Inc.'s stock (NYSE: BF-B, BF-A) surged on better-than-expected Q2 results: EPS of 55 cents (beating street view of 51 cents) and sales of $1.095B (3% organic growth). Operating income rose by 1% to $341M. Finlandia and Sonoma-Cutrer divestitures led to net sales decline in H1. Visit Benzinga.com for full details.
news.summary: The stock prices of Brown Forman Inc. (NYSE: BF-B) (NYSE: BF-A) saw an increase as they released their second-quarter financial report, surpassing expectations. Their earnings per share for the quarter were reported at 55 cents, exceeding the projected 51 cents. Despite a 1% decrease in quarterly sales, which amounted to $1.095 billion, it still outperformed the estimated $1.076 billion, with a 3% increase in sales organically. The company attributed the sales decline in the first half of the year to the sale of Finlandia and Sonoma-Cutrer. Operating income also experienced a 1% rise, reaching $341 million. For a detailed analysis, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Bitcoin surpasses $100,000 as McDonald's brings back McRib, historically linked to BTC price doubling.
news.summary: On Thursday, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) surpassed the $100,000 mark as McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) brought back its popular McRib sandwich. This aligns with a recurring trend noticed in previous years. According to analysis from internbrah, Bitcoin has historically doubled in value following the reintroduction of the McRib. In a tweet featuring a chart, internbrah emphasized the pattern, stating, "The McRib is back. BTC historically surges by over 2 times after the McRib's return. Don't disregard the impact of the McRib." The correlation depicted in the chart highlights the significant relationship between these events.

news.headline: Global water heater market valued at $23.7 billion in 2023, expected to reach $32.1 billion by 2029 with 5.2% CAGR growth. Urbanization and rising incomes drive demand for smart water heaters.
news.summary: A recent report "Water Heater: Global Markets" added to ResearchAndMarkets.com indicates the global water heater market was worth $23.7 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $32.1 billion by 2029, with a 5.2% CAGR throughout the forecast period. Factors contributing to this growth include urbanization and higher disposable incomes, spurring the demand for modern amenities in the market.

news.headline: Enlivex reports positive interim results from Allocetra trial for knee osteoarthritis patients. Phase I data promising.
news.summary: Enlivex Therapeutics Ltd., a company listed on Nasdaq as ENLV, based in Nes-Ziona, Israel, disclosed encouraging interim effectiveness findings on December 5, 2024. The data emerged from the Phase I segment of the Phase I/II Allocetra™ study across multiple countries. This trial focuses on individuals afflicted with moderate to severe knee osteoarthritis.

news.headline: New Kiddie Academy of Arvada in Denver offers nature-based education; first-time entrepreneur opens with a 'business with a purpose' mantra.
news.summary: A new child care franchise location of the nationally recognized Kiddie Academy® Educational Child Care has recently opened in ARVADA, Colo. The ambitious entrepreneur behind this venture is running the Denver-area franchise with a strong sense of purpose. Kiddie Academy of Arvada officially began its operations on December 5, 2024. This franchise is dedicated to providing high-quality educational child care services, catering to the needs of the community.

news.headline: Meta plans $10B AI data center in Louisiana, its largest globally at 4M sq. ft. Construction to begin in Dec, last until 2030.
news.summary: Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ:META) has announced a partnership with Louisiana Economic Development (LED) to establish a $10 billion AI data center in northeast Louisiana. This will be Meta's largest global facility, covering 4 million square feet in Richland Parish. Construction is set to begin in December with a completion date projected for 2030. The Richland Parish Data Center will play a critical role in managing the extensive data processing requirements for Meta's AI workloads. It will provide support for various Meta platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, Messenger, and Threads. This initiative signifies a significant investment in Louisiana's innovation ecosystem.

news.headline: OPEC+ extends oil output cuts of 3.65M bpd through late 2026, with gradual unwinding from April 2025. Market watch #OPEC #oil.
news.summary: The OPEC+ group has agreed to extend oil production cuts of 3.65 million barrels per day until the end of 2026. In addition, member countries implementing additional voluntary cuts of 2.2 million bpd will continue these reductions until March 2025. The cautious stance is to counter oversupply risks amid global demand concerns. OPEC+ also announced a gradual unwinding of cuts starting in April 2025 over an 18-month period to manage output levels effectively. This decision aims to stabilize oil markets while addressing rising output from non-OPEC+ producers. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: FDA approves AstraZeneca's Imfinzi for LS-SCLC, reducing death risk by 27% in the trial. Median survival: 55.9 months vs. 33.4 with placebo.
news.summary: The FDA has granted approval to AstraZeneca Plc's Imfinzi (durvalumab) for use in adult patients with limited-stage small cell lung cancer (LS-SCLC) who have not seen progression after undergoing concurrent platinum-based chemotherapy and radiation therapy. LS-SCLC is known for its aggressiveness. The approval was based on findings from the ADRIATIC Phase 3 trial, showcased during the 2024 American Society of Clinical Oncology Annual Meeting and later published in the New England Journal of Medicine. In the trial, Imfinzi exhibited a 27% reduced risk of death compared to a placebo. The median overall survival was approximately 55.9 months for Imfinzi and 33.4 months for the placebo. This development marks a significant advancement in the treatment of LS-SCLC patients.

news.headline: PVH Corp. shares drop as Q3 results beat analyst estimates with $2.255B sales but soft guidance. Europe sales lowered for better quality.
news.summary: PVH Corp. (NYSE: PVH) stock prices have declined following the release of their third-quarter financial results and guidance. The company reported sales of $2.255 billion, surpassing the analyst estimate of $2.220 billion. International business revenue remained stagnant compared to last year and dropped by 2% in constant currency terms. Although there was growth in the Asia Pacific region, this was offset by a deliberate decrease in European sales to enhance sales quality. North American revenue from Tommy Hilfiger and Calvin Klein brands fell by 6% year-over-year, partly due to a shift in wholesale shipments. Direct-to-consumer revenue remained unchanged year-over-year, with a 1% increase in owned store revenue, while digital commerce revenue experienced a decline.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs warns Trump's 25% tariff on Canada, Mexico may shrink their GDP by 4% and US by 0.4%, affecting North America.
news.summary: President-elect Donald Trump's proposal of imposing a 25% tariff on imports from Canada and Mexico is expected to have severe economic consequences. Goldman Sachs predicts that Canada and Mexico could experience up to a 4% decline in GDP, while the U.S. GDP could contract by 0.4%. Every 10-percentage-point increase in tariffs could reduce GDP by 1.5% for Canada and 2% for Mexico, with the full 25% tariff potentially causing a more than 2.5% and 3.5% GDP reduction in Canada and Mexico, respectively. The economists also warn of surging consumer prices and a slowdown in U.S. growth. This move could have significant negative impacts on North America's economies and its trading relationships.

news.headline: Dow Jones down post jobs data; Tesla drops due to Musk's pay package rejection. Rejection impacts company stock.
news.summary: The Dow Jones experienced a decline on Tuesday following the release of important job data. Additionally, Tesla shares took a hit when a judge turned down Elon Musk's proposed pay package.

news.headline: Pan Capital appoints Edouard Robbes as President & Chief Strategy Officer to lead energy investments.
news.summary: In New York, Pan Capital has appointed Edouard Robbes as the President and Chief Strategy Officer to spearhead innovation, expansion, and direction in energy-focused investments.

news.headline: Southwest Airlines lifts Q4 guidance, starts $750M buyback in Q1 2025. Now $1.5B left of $2.5B program; RASM to increase by 5.5%-7.0%.
news.summary: Southwest Airlines Company (NYSE:LUV) saw its stock rise as it announced a $750 million stock buyback program set for the first quarter of 2025. This follows a previous $250 million accelerated share repurchase from October 2024. With this, $1.5 billion will remain under the company's $2.5 billion repurchase plan authorized in September 2024. In its updated fourth-quarter guidance, Southwest now anticipates RASM to increase by 5.5% to 7.0% compared to the previous 3.5% to 5.5%, and economic fuel costs per gallon to range from $2.35 to $2.45, up from the earlier $2.25 figure. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: In Redding, California on December 5, 2024, a recent market analysis report was released outlining key insights on the Butterfly Pea Flowers market. This report covers various segments including types such as Whole Dried Flowers, Powder, and Extracts, as well as Distribution Channels like Business-to-Business (B2B) and Business-to-Consumer (B2C). The applications studied in the report include Beverages and Food Products. The report provides information on market Size, Share, Forecast, and Trends Analysis related to Butterfly Pea Flowers.
